description: Big operators (∑ sum / ∏ product / ∫ integral / ∮ contour integral / ⋃ big union / ⋂ big intersection) and big functions (lim/max/min/sup/inf) with their sub/sup limits. Per 《盲文常用数学符号》, all big-operator limits use the below/above position (46-dot prefix ⠨).

cases.note: rules §58 summation ⠸⠎
rules §59 product ⠸⠏
integral ⠮
《盲文常用数学符号》big union ⋃ ⠸⠼
《盲文常用数学符号》big intersection ⋂ ⠰⠹

scripts.description: Big operators with sub/sup limits — limit markers carry the 46 prefix (below/above ⠨⠡/⠨⠌)

cases.note: sum lower/upper limits carry the 46 prefix; the trailing a_i is an ordinary single-letter subscript (no 46) and closes with ⠱
sum with sub-only limit; trailing a_i closes with ⠱
sum with sup-only limit; trailing a_i closes with ⠱
sum with empty sup; trailing a_k closes with ⠱
prod with full limits; trailing a_i closes with ⠱
prod with sub-only; trailing a_n closes with ⠱
integral with both bounds (atomic digits, big_op_prefix=46); dx is one lowercase run ⠰⠙⠭ — matches the docx integral example ⠮⠰⠭⠌⠍⠱⠰⠙⠭
integral with letter sub bound only
《盲文常用数学符号》contour integral ∮ ⠮⠴ (= ∫ + 356), no sub/sup limits; f d x are adjacent same-class letters → one ⠰ (二.规则1; the print thin-space has no braille cell)
big union ⋃ with lower/upper limits carrying the 46 prefix; trailing A_i closes with ⠱
big intersection ⋂ with a lower limit carrying the 46 prefix; trailing A_i closes with ⠱

big_op_functions.description: Big functions lim/max/min/sup/inf with sub/sup — limit markers carry the 46 prefix

cases.note: rules §62 \lim ⠫⠇⠍ + sub limit with prefix
max(m+x) + sub limit with the 46 prefix
min(m+n) + sub limit; trailing a_n closes with ⠱
sup(s+u+p) + sub limit
inf(i+n+f) + sub limit; trailing a_n closes with ⠱
